description: You are a space debris compliance analyst at a satellite operator. The regulatory authority requires an IADC 25-year post-mission disposal (PMD) compliance report for the 5 satellites listed in the manifest at ~/Desktop/debris_manifest.csv. For each satellite, determine if it meets the PMD rule and estimate its deorbit lifetime using a GMAT simulation with JacchiaRoberts drag (F10.7=150) propagated until deorbit (altitude < 120 km) or 9125 days. Write the compliance report to ~/GMAT_output/debris_compliance_report.txt with one line per satellite using the format "SAT_NAME: COMPLIANT, lifetime_years=<value>" or "SAT_NAME: NON
